ddls:
CREATE TABLE "flakes" (
  "flake_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each flake */,
  "oriname_oriflakeid" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the original image or flake */,
  "thicklabel" TEXT /* Label or category of the flake (e.g., glue) */,
  "cluster_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cluster the flake belongs to */,
  "within_cluster_id" INTEGER /* ID of the flake within the cluster */,
  "flake_center_row" INTEGER /* Row coordinate of the flake center */,
  "flake_center_column" INTEGER /* Column coordinate of the flake center */,
  "flake_size" INTEGER /* Size of the flake */,
  "flake_orientation" TEXT /* Orientation of the flake (e.g., horizontal, vertical) */,
  "flake_color" TEXT /* Color of the flake (e.g., red, blue) */,
  "flake_shape" TEXT /* Shape of the flake (e.g., circle, square) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the flake was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the flake was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("flake_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flakes_thicklabel FOREIGN KEY ("thicklabel") REFERENCES flake_types ("type_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flakes_cluster_id FOREIGN KEY ("cluster_id") REFERENCES clusters ("cluster_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clusters" (
  "cluster_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cluster */,
  "cluster_name" TEXT /* Name of the cluster */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the cluster */,
  "cluster_type" TEXT /* Type of the cluster (e.g., flake, aggregate) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the cluster was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the cluster was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cluster_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "flake_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each flake type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the flake type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the flake type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the flake type was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the flake type was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "flake_images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image */,
  "flake_id" INTEGER /* ID of the flake the image belongs to */,
  "image_file" TEXT /* File path to the image file */,
  "image_size" REAL /* Size of the image file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the image was uploaded */,
  "image_format" TEXT /* Format of the image (e.g., JPEG, PNG) */,
  "image_resolution" TEXT /* Resolution of the image (e.g., 1024x768) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flake_images_flake_id FOREIGN KEY ("flake_id") REFERENCES flakes ("flake_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "flake_id" INTEGER /* ID of the flake being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the flake */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the flake was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_location" TEXT /* Location of access (e.g., IP address, country) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_flake_id FOREIGN KEY ("flake_id") REFERENCES flakes ("flake_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "annotations" (
  "annotation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each annotation */,
  "flake_id" INTEGER /* ID of the flake the annotation belongs to */,
  "annotation_text" TEXT /* Text of the annotation */,
  "annotation_date" TEXT /* Date the annotation was made */,
  "annotation_type" TEXT /* Type of annotation (e.g., note, tag) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("annotation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_annotations_flake_id FOREIGN KEY ("flake_id") REFERENCES flakes ("flake_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "flake_properties" (
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property */,
  "flake_id" INTEGER /* ID of the flake the property belongs to */,
  "property_name" TEXT /* Name of the property (e.g., shape, size) */,
  "property_value" TEXT /* Value of the property */,
  "property_unit" TEXT /* Unit of the property (e.g., mm, cm) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flake_properties_flake_id FOREIGN KEY ("flake_id") REFERENCES flakes ("flake_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "research_projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "project_description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the project was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the project was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "flake_project_associations" (
  "association_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each association */,
  "flake_id" INTEGER /* ID of the flake */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the association was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the association was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("association_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flake_project_associations_flake_id FOREIGN KEY ("flake_id") REFERENCES flakes ("flake_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flake_project_associations_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES research_projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_exports" (
  "export_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each export */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who exported the data */,
  "export_date" TEXT /* Date the data was exported */,
  "export_format" TEXT /* Format of the exported data (e.g., CSV, JSON) */,
  "export_data" TEXT /* Exported data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("export_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_exports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
